title: 1-2-3 Magic for Christian Parents
author: Thomas W. Phelan
subline: Three steps. One countdown. Zero yelling.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Three giant numbers: 1, 2, 3 — in a row. Number 3 is RED. A subtle cross watermark behind. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 920)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- Watermark cross behind, very subtle -->
    <g stroke="#1a1a1a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="square">
      <line x1="-340" y1="-380" x2="340" y2="-380"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-580" x2="0" y2="-180"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The 1, 2, 3 row -->
    <g font-weight="300" letter-spacing="-0.05em">
      <text x="-540" y="-40" font-size="540" fill="#cccccc">1</text>
      <text x="0" y="-40" font-size="540" fill="#cccccc">2</text>
      <text x="540" y="-40" font-size="540" fill="#fc1c46">3</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Whisper labels under each -->
    <g font-size="20" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em">
      <text x="-540" y="40" fill="#cccccc">COUNT</text>
      <text x="0" y="40" fill="#cccccc">WARN</text>
      <text x="540" y="40" fill="#fc1c46">TIME OUT</text>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The book is literally the 1-2-3 countdown. Three huge numerals — 1, 2, 3 — sit in a row, with 3 in red (the final step, the time-out). A subtle cross watermark behind them marks the Christian edition. 220px weight-500 title sits at the bottom.
